title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Kochi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
